ACCOUNT_TEMPORARILY_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
PHONE_IN_USE: Phone number is already in use.
EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: Email does not exist in the system.
OTP_SENT: OTP has been sent to your email.
ACCOUNT_LINKED_TO_OTHER: This email is already linked to a different social account.
USERNAME_GENERATION_FAILED: Could not allocate a unique username, please try again.
OTP_VERIFY_LOCKED: Too many failed OTP attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
REFRESH_TOKEN_REUSE_DETECTED: Suspicious activity detected. All sessions have been revoked for your security.
OTP_STILL_VALID: An OTP has already been sent and is still valid. Please check your email or try again in {seconds} seconds.
PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
USER_NOT_IN_GROUP: This user does not belong to your group.
